description: Composition Blue brief made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex fabric, has the signature logo on the waistband, a keyhole fly, shaped-to-Fit contoured pouch, print on the back and printed label on the inner Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cold iron if needed Revel in the comfort of soft cotton/spandex fabric with these blue fashion briefs from spykar. Crafted from a quick dry fabric, the cut of this brief allows free leg movement, branding printed on the waistband offers style while the printed label gives abrasion-free comfort.
